name: project-aero
description: USA Project — administrative and public auditing tools for a ROBLOX mock-government community

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @aero/shared && concurrently --kill-others --names shared,api,web --prefix-colors cyan,blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @aero/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @aero/api" "npm run dev --workspace @aero/web"
